scoring: Each point earns all assigned score when its complete check passes, otherwise zero.

points.goal: Identify the AlloyWorks matter and required dashboard scope.
Rank the off-site bid-file destruction as critical post-hold loss with correct volume, categories, status, and disclosure action.
Identify both uncollected personal messaging sources as personal-source gaps with correct categories and collection action.
Identify the AlloyWorks third-party waiver privilege entry with correct category, count, status, third-party marker, and waiver action.
Identify the AlloyWorks privilege-log gap and calculate 72 unlogged documents from 106 withheld and 34 logged.
Identify the Teams archive as an available remediation source for the deleted pricing channel and map it to categories D and E.
Identify the category F zero-claim contradiction as a responsiveness miscoding risk tied to both bid-email documents and QC finding.
Report the required category coverage rows and integer metrics for the dashboard.
Provide the required ranked action plan for preservation disclosure, waiver assessment, recoding, privilege-log supplementation, personal-source collection, and archive search.
